messages.text: yes, please break down into subtasks for me

I'll create a structured breakdown of subtasks for the demo video project.

✓ Creating subtasks for "Shoot new demo video":

1. Pre-production Planning (High Priority)
   - Create demo video script/outline
     Description: Document key points and flow of the demo
     Dependencies: None
   
   - Define key features to showcase
     Description: List and prioritize git hooks features to demonstrate
     Dependencies: Script outline
   
   - Plan recording schedule
     Description: Set timeline and resource requirements
     Dependencies: Feature list

2. Production Phase (High Priority)
   - Setup recording environment
     Description: Configure screen recording and audio equipment
     Dependencies: Pre-production planning
   
   - Record screen captures
     Description: Record git hooks functionality demonstrations
     Dependencies: Recording setup
   
   - Record voice-over
     Description: Narrate the demonstration clearly
     Dependencies: Screen captures

3. Post-production (Medium Priority)
   - Edit video footage
     Description: Combine and trim recorded segments
     Dependencies: All recordings complete
   
   - Add transitions and effects
     Description: Enhance visual flow and highlight key points
     Dependencies: Initial edit
   
   - Create title cards and captions
     Description: Add text overlays and explanatory captions
     Dependencies: Edit complete
   
   - Add background music
     Description: Include appropriate background audio
     Dependencies: Final edit

4. Review and Finalization (Medium Priority)
   - Internal review
     Description: Team review of complete draft
     Dependencies: Post-production complete
   
   - Implement feedback
     Description: Make necessary adjustments from review
     Dependencies: Internal review
   
   - Final export
     Description: Create final video file in required formats
     Dependencies: Feedback implementation
   
   - Upload and distribution
     Description: Share video through appropriate channels
     Dependencies: Final export

3. Add more technical details about the git hooks features to showcase?
4. Create a timeline view of all subtasks?
